description: A production line that was making one product now needs to be cleaned and set up to make a different product.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the changeover checklist for switching from Product A to Product B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct checklist which includes specific cleaning instructions.

nodes.task_description: Execute the cleaning procedures and record their completion in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Operator completes and signs off on all cleaning steps.

nodes.task_description: After cleaning, take a swab sample and send it to QC for release testing to ensure no cross-contamination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent takes a sample and creates a lab order for cleanliness verification.
